_comment: Fill in your real calibration values and remove this comment. All units in pixels (K) and mm (baseline). Run single-camera calibration (chessboard) for K/D values.
_optional_comment: Add R (3x3 rotation matrix) and T ([tx,ty,tz] translation) only if you have run cv2.stereoCalibrate. If omitted, R=identity and T=[baseline,0,0] are assumed (cameras treated as perfectly parallel).
